example: In the quiet of the night, I feel your heart.
Through the shadows of the past, your voice is all I hear.
Every moment that we share is precious.
Every dream we couldn't chase still inspires us.
We couldn't chase every dream, but we tried.
A love that burns so bright never fades.
Holding on through every storm shows our strength.
It's unclear what we feel sometimes.
Our hearts remain as warm despite the distance.
And though the road is long and hard, we keep going.
Her melody, your love, fills the air.
Nothing in this world can break the bone we made so strong.
zh: 折斷骨頭（比喻堅不可摧）
ja: 骨を折る（比喩的に強さを表す）

example: We keep each other in our souls.
